events.text: Appearance of Radha Kunda, snana dana
Aksaya Trtiya. Candana Yatra starts. (Continues for 21 days)
Ksaya tithi: Caturthi -- 20 Apr 07:30 to 21 Apr 04:17 (LT)
Srimati Sita Devi (consort of Lord Sri Rama) -- Appearance
Nrsimha Caturdasi: Appearance of Lord Nrsimhadeva
Ksaya tithi: Caturdasi -- 15 May 08:33 to 16 May 05:13 (LT)
Ksaya tithi: Saptami -- 22 May 06:26 to 23 May 05:06 (LT)
